CONTESTS.PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Create contests, capture entries, and monitor performance from one place.
CONTESTS.LIST_SUBHEADING: Launch or manage contests and review their current audience participation.
CONTESTS.FORM_SUBHEADING: Define how customers join your contest and how their messages are captured.
CONTESTS.FORM_TRIGGER_WORDS_PLACEHOLDER: Add a keyword and press enter
CONTESTS.FORM_TRIGGER_WORDS_HELP: Customers who DM these words are automatically added to the contest. Add up to 10 keywords.
CONTESTS.FORM_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: Outline the contest mechanics, prize details, and how entries are counted.
CONTESTS.FORM_TERMS_PLACEHOLDER: Add participation rules, eligibility, and disclaimer language.
CONTESTS.FORM_SECTION_QUESTIONNAIRE_HELP: Add the questions Stark should ask entrants when they join this contest.
CONTESTS.FORM_VALIDATION_TRIGGER_WORDS: Add at least one trigger word.
CONTESTS.FORM_VALIDATION_DATE_ORDER: End date must be on or after the start date.
CONTESTS.EDIT_NOT_FOUND: We couldn’t find that contest. Please return to the contest list.
CONTESTS.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This will remove "{name}" and its trigger words from the dashboard. This action cannot be undone.
CONTESTS.EMPTY_MESSAGE: No contests yet. Create one to start capturing trigger-word submissions.
CONTESTS.REPORTS_SUBHEADING: Review who has entered your contests and when submissions were captured.
CONTESTS.REPORTS_EMPTY_STATE: Entries will appear here once submissions are received.
CONTESTS.ERROR_FETCHING: Unable to load contests. Please try again.
CONTESTS.ERROR_CREATE: Unable to create contest. Please try again.
CONTESTS.ERROR_UPDATE: Unable to update contest. Please try again.
CONTESTS.ERROR_DELETE: Unable to delete contest. Please try again.
CONTESTS.ERROR_FETCHING_CUSTOMERS: Unable to load contest customers. Please try again.
CONTESTS.ERROR_MISSING_DEALERSHIP: This account is missing a dealership ID. Please update account settings and try again.
CONTESTS.REPORT_DIALOG_EMPTY: No responses captured for this range.
CONTESTS.CUSTOMERS_SUBHEADING: See who entered your contest and which contests create the most qualified leads.
CONTESTS.CUSTOMERS_DATE_RANGE_HINT: Choose a start and end date to view contest entries.
CONTESTS.CUSTOMERS_SUMMARY_NEW_LEADS_HINT: New contacts sourced from this contest
CONTESTS.CUSTOMERS_SUMMARY_CONVERSIONS_HINT: Test drives or showroom visits scheduled
CONTESTS.CUSTOMERS_SUMMARY_COMPLETION_HINT: Share of entrants who answered all questions
CONTESTS.CUSTOMERS_EMPTY: No customers just yet. Share this contest and start collecting entries.
